## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's renewal proposal for 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Proposal:** GrowthX proposed a $145k/yr renewal ($12k/mo baseline + $1k/mo for launch support), shifting from a high-volume model (40 articles/mo) to a strategic one (26 articles/mo) focused on quality and new product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:** The shift supports Exec's evolution from a point solution to an AI engine, targeting new audiences (L\&D, HR) and new revenue lines (call scoring, LMS) to provide critical fundraising proof points.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Key Concern:** The proposal's cost is significantly higher than other vendors Exec has evaluated, which is the primary hurdle to renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [**Tooling Opportunity:** Exec can save \~$300/mo by switching from Profound to GrowthX's included tool, Scrunch, and gain early access to GrowthX's new AI visibility tool, CheckThat.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Topics

### Content & Publishing Update

  - [**CMS Access:** Publishing issues are resolved; all 10 articles are live.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Placement Articles:** Two articles ("best sales roleplay platform," "AI sales coaching platform") were published to `exec.com` instead of the Placement site.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [**Action:** Garett will fix the URLs; Jo will instruct the publishing specialist to QA all future Placement posts.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**New Content:** This week's production focuses on a comparison post to capture organic traffic from users searching for alternatives (e.g., "Luster vs. \[Exec\]").](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)

### 2026 Renewal Proposal

  - [**Context:** Exec needs to prove organic growth for fundraising and reposition the platform from a point solution to an AI engine, expanding into new audiences (L\&D, HR) and revenue lines (call scoring, LMS).](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**Proposed Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [Double 2025 signups & demos.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [Increase organic visibility by \~40%.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [Secure top 3 SERP rankings for 3 commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [Secure top 3 SERP rankings for a few high-value top-of-funnel keywords (e.g., "sales roleplay scenarios").](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [Acquire 10 quality backlinks per month.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [**Proposed Package:**](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
      - [**Cost:** $145,000 per year.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
      - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
          - [**Baseline ($12k/mo):** 20 articles/mo, 5 backlinks/mo, on-page optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
          - [**Launch Support ($1k/mo):** 6 dedicated articles/mo for new product launches (e.g., call scoring).](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
      - [**Total Articles:** 26 per month.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [**Rationale for Reduced Volume:** The shift from 40 to 26 articles/mo is strategic—focusing on higher-quality, more impactful content to drive better SEO results and business value, rather than prioritizing article count.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Tooling & Cost Savings

  - [**Opportunity:** Exec can save \~$300/mo by switching from Profound to GrowthX's included visibility tool, Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [**Future Access:** GrowthX offered Exec early access to its new AI visibility tool, CheckThat.ai, launching in Q1 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [**Decision:** Garett will research Scrunch and discuss the switch with Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:** Send the renewal proposal deck to Garett.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [**Garett:** Review the proposal with Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [**Garett:** Research Scrunch and discuss a potential switch with Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [**Garett:** Fix the URLs for the two Placement articles published to `exec.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Jo:** Instruct the publishing specialist to QA all future Placement posts.](https://fathom.video/share/2aLCv6vrkbmMwKHWGKamUBvgv5CUFFJn?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
